instructions.instruction: **Verify authorization** — attempt an unauthorized action in the browser or console and confirm it raises `Pundit::NotAuthorizedError` or `CanCan::AccessDenied` as expected
instructions.original_snippets: **Verify authorization** — attempt an unauthorized action in the browser or console and confirm it raises `Pundit::NotAuthorizedError` or `CanCan::AccessDenied` as expected
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger implement-authorization.
